w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: March 2026 · Every lesson learned. Never get lost again.
THE GOLDEN RULES — READ THESE FIRST, EVERY TIME
Every git command runs from inside the ashok-portfolio folder —
Root Directory in Vercel must be completely blank —
package.json must list every package the code imports —
TypeScript property names must exactly match constants.ts —
inline React styles cannot define keyframes
preview URLs with hashes are not production
SECTION 1 — BEFORE YOU START ANY SESSION
Run these commands every time before touching any code:
If git branch does not show * main — run: git checkout main
SECTION 2 — STANDARD COMMIT AND DEPLOY SEQUENCE
Every time you make a change, run these commands in order:
git commit -m "fix: describe what you changed"
Then: watch Vercel dashboard → wait for green checkmark (2–3 mins) → open ashok.alchemetryx.com → press Ctrl+Shift+R
Every error encountered during this build — with exact causes and fixes.
Root Directory in Vercel has something typed in it
Vercel → Settings → General → Root Directory → delete everything → blank → Save → Redeploy
Root Directory field must be completely empty — not ./ not ashok-portfolio
Package is imported in code but not listed in package.json
npm install X then git add package.json package-lock.json then commit and push
npm install lenis gsap @gsap/react three @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei resend
ERROR: "Type error: Property X does not exist"
Component uses a property name that does not match constants.ts exactly
Check constants.ts for the exact property name. Common mismatches below:
Search all files: VS Code → Ctrl+Shift+F → search for the wrong property name
JSX syntax error — usually a closing > on its own line or missing quote marks
Go to the line shown in the error. Put the entire JSX element on one single line.
Text ← all on one line, no line breaks inside
ERROR: "Object literal may only specify known properties" (Lenis)
Using Lenis v1 API property names but Lenis v2 is installed
Replace old property names with new ones:
ERROR: Hydration error with rtrvr-ls attributes
Retriever browser extension injecting attributes — never appears in production
Add suppressHydrationWarning to the body tag in layout.tsx
Remote master has commits your local main does not have
ERROR: "The specified Root Directory does not exist"
Vercel Root Directory is set to a folder that no longer exists in the repo
Vercel → Settings → Root Directory → delete everything → blank → Save → Redeploy
ERROR: Images not showing (blank or invisible)
Either images missing from public/images/ OR @keyframes not defined in globals.css
Check image files exist first, then check globals.css has all keyframes
Then check globals.css has these keyframes:
@keyframes revealUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }
@keyframes marquee { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); } }
Cursor defined in both layout.tsx (CustomCursor component) and page.tsx
Keep CustomCursor only in layout.tsx. Remove all cursor code from page.tsx.
findstr "cur" src\app\page.tsx ← if this returns cursor code, delete it
ERROR: Hero content invisible — opacity stays at 0
Animation fires before DOM elements are mounted
Use refs instead of class selectors. Wrap reveal calls in requestAnimationFrame.
ERROR: Wrong data on live site (wrong stats, wrong experience dates)
page.tsx has hardcoded inline content instead of using section components
page.tsx should ONLY import and render section components. No hardcoded data.
What lives where. Never move these files.
page.tsx ← imports and renders section components ONLY
globals.css ← all @keyframes, CSS variables, base styles
CustomCursor.tsx ← single cursor lives here ONLY
constants.ts ← all data: STATS, EXPERTISE, EXPERIENCE, NAVIGATION
These are the EXACT property names. Use nothing else.
Never change these values. They are the brand.
Display font: Bebas Neue (free) → Galgo Condensed (paid, future)
You are on Windows. These Linux commands do not work. Use these instead.
Run this anytime something feels wrong. If npm run build passes locally, Vercel will too.
findstr "next" package.json ← should show next: "^15.x.x" or "^16.x.x"
findstr "lenis" package.json ← should show lenis version
findstr "gsap" package.json ← should show gsap version
dir public\images\ ← should show hero.png and about.png
git log --oneline -5 ← shows your last 5 commits
npm run build ← must pass before pushing to Vercel
If everything is broken and you need a clean slate:
Then in Vercel: Deployments → latest → three dots → Redeploy → uncheck Use existing build cache → Deploy
If Vercel still shows the wrong Root Directory after a force push:
Vercel → Settings → General → Root Directory → completely blank → Save → Redeploy
ashok.alchemetryx.com · github.com/ashok-1986/ashok-portfolio · Production branch: master · Root Directory: blank
